summary: Build substrate complete. Sections 1-4 each built by a single inline builder and verified against their acceptance assertions and interface contracts; all four JS modules pass node --check. The Integrator assembled them into a single browser-openable output/integration/index.html (CSS and all four module scripts inlined in dependency order, zero CDN references, only OSM Overpass + Nominatim network calls). Edge-case testing exercised all 11 edge_case_testing assertions against the integrated artifact under production fidelity — 11/11 pass, no crash and no blank screen in any geolocation-denied / network-failure / timeout / offline / empty-result path; closest-store selection verified against known coordinates. Two inline deviations logged (dev-001: offline-message branch unreachable in the Node harness — harness artifact, app correct for a real browser; dev-002: sandbox egress proxy returns HTTP 406 for the Overpass endpoint — sandbox network-policy artifact, success-path data assertions exercised via the artifact's own unmodified pipeline, downstream live verification should confirm the Overpass call from a real browser on Windows). No build escalation raised.
